data.Description: Green City Dental is a biological dental office located north of Seattle. We strive to be minimally invasive and maximally preventive.As an accredited biological dental hygienist, I want to find the root of the problem and help the patient heal naturally. In addition to my dental hygiene background, I have training in orofacial myofunctional therapy. I love working with patients to breathe and chew better as well as heal gum disease with all manner of nonsurgical periodontal therapies and our "Stop Tooth Decay in its Tracks" programs. Dr. Rebecca Taylor and I like to work together to heal our patients using individualized and customized treatment plans.At Green City, we offer meticulous, uncompromising, state-of-the-art dental care with a commitment to honoring and caring for the beauty, importance, and sovereignty of ourselves and every person we have the privilege to serve with love, joy, compassion, and respect.

data.Description: Discover a dental practice that goes beyond the ordinary. At Smile Oasis, in Spring Valley, we believe that a beautiful, healthy smile can transform lives. Our team of experienced dentists is dedicated to providing exceptional care in an elevated environment. Whether you need a routine check-up or a complete smile makeover, we are here to help you achieve your dream smile. As the first and only Digital Smile Design certified office in Las Vegas, we guarantee an experience and result like none other.

data.Description: We are a new practice in Memphis, TN and we are happily accepting new patients! We provide comprehensive dental care with an emphasis on clean, safe dentistry that is customized for our patient's needs. We will work in collaboration with your physician or naturopath at your request. Dr. Adair is currently implementing protocol for safe mercury amalgam removal and is training in the SMART Program for certification. We welcome patients with all different needs, and we are happy to spend the time with you as you pursue a more integrative approach to your dental health.Dr. Jennifer Adair is a University of Pennsylvania School of Dental Medicine grad and has completed a General Practice Residency at the VA Medical Center in Philadelphia, PA. She has been in private practice since 2011 and is committed to the principles of science-based, integrative dental care. Although she holds new membership with the IAOMT, she has long regarded the group as the most valuable organization to modern dentistry.Adair Dental Medicine is open from 8AM-5PM every Monday through Thursday. We can be reached at 901-767-2152 or by email at frontdesk@adairdentalmedicine.com.

data.Description:
Whether it’s due to cosmetic or health concerns, there are genuine metal free alternatives, which not only look great but are strong, long-lasting and biocompatible.

We want our patients to take an active role in improving how they feel about their oral health and appearance. Our experienced, caring clinicians provide holistic solutions for cosmetic dentistry services, which can also enhance the overall condition of your gums and teeth. 

We’re based in Manchester and offer a full range of services, including mercury amalgam removal, metal free fillings and metal free zirconia dental implants, as well as porcelain fillings, crowns and bridges. We’re happy to talk through your options to find the right solution for your needs.

data.Description: We are an in-network Delta Dental provider.  We take great pride in cultivating trusting connections with our patients and adopting a conservative BIOMIMETIC approach to dental care.  Unlike other offices where dentists juggle multiple patients simultaneously, we prioritize individualized scheduling, dedicating our attention to one person at a time. This exclusive scheduling ensures that you receive our undivided expertise and ample time, eliminating the need to rush through procedures while maintaining punctuality. Our unique business model enables us to deliver superior care and service when compared to neighboring dental practices. We invite you to experience this refreshing new "old" style of dentistry.

query:
SELECT *,  (
		CONVERT(Master, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Fellow, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Accredited, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Hygiene_Master, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Smart, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Hygiene_Fellow, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(Biological_Dental_Hygiene_Accredited, UNSIGNED) + 
		CONVERT(General, UNSIGNED)
	) AS Certification_Level_Count  FROM wp_lzi72b_zc_accounts WHERE ((Account_Name like '%%'  
    AND not exists (
        select * from `wp_lzi72b_zc_accounts` as `zc_account_reversed_0` 
        where `wp_lzi72b_zc_accounts`.`module_id` = `zc_account_reversed_0`.`Parent_Account_ID`
    ) 
    AND Listed_Public = 'Yes, I am ready to be placed on the IAOMT website to start receiving patient referrals.' 
    AND Membership_Status = 'Active'
)) ORDER BY  Master DESC, Fellow DESC, Accredited DESC, Smart DESC, Hygiene_Master DESC, Hygiene_Fellow DESC, Biological_Dental_Hygiene_Accredited DESC, General DESC, LOWER(SUBSTRING_INDEX(Account_Name, ' ', -1)) ASC LIMIT 50 OFFSET 700
